name: bench-excalidraw
description: Generate Excalidraw sketches in the Bench Obsidian vault. Agents emit a compact DSL; the server materializes a valid `.excalidraw.md` file with auto-layout, stable bindings, and hand-drawn styling. Raw-JSON path exists for long-tail cases. Status: DRAFT — pending Phase 1 DSL library @bench/excalidraw-dsl.

tools.name: excalidraw_diagram_from_dsl
tools.description: Primary tool. Materialize a diagram from a compact YAML DSL (nodes + edges + layout hint). ~10x cheaper than emitting raw JSON. Use for: agent flows, tier ladders, data pipelines, lifecycle loops, simple org charts. Library handles layout, collision avoidance, and bindings.

tools.name: excalidraw_from_template
tools.description: Shortcut over the DSL for named templates. Templates: `agent_flow` (N boxes + labeled arrows), `tier_ladder` (stacked blocks + badges), `data_pipeline` (horizontal flow), `lifecycle_loop` (circular). Callers supply labels; the template supplies layout + colors. Cheapest path per call — keep this as the default for structured, recurring visuals.

tools.name: excalidraw_write_raw
tools.description: Escape hatch. Accepts a full Excalidraw scene JSON and wraps it in the `.excalidraw.md` shell. Use ONLY when the DSL/templates can't express the diagram (e.g., novel layout, custom icons, embedded images). Caller-provided JSON is validated against the Excalidraw v2 scene schema before write; invalid JSON returns 400. Expensive — prefer the DSL path.

body_schema.scene: object (Excalidraw v2 scene JSON: {type, version, source, elements, appState, files})

notes.cost_policy: Per-call, not per-agent-turn. DO NOT wire into agent loops that fire on every user message — generating drawings automatically is expensive without signal. Call only when a diagram is explicitly useful (canon authoring, customer-facing support reply, onboarding doc).
notes.vault_location: All writes land in the Obsidian vault at ~/.openclaw/wiki/main/. Path prefix `_boards/excalidraw-experiments/` or `canon/topics/*/diagrams/` recommended. Respect .gitignore — vault is user-local, drawings sync via the wiki-mirror pipeline.
notes.layout_caveat: DSL library auto-layout is good for ≤ 10 nodes. For denser graphs, library emits a warning and falls through to a best-effort packed layout — human may need to tidy in Excalidraw editor.
not_yet_implemented: excalidraw_annotate_existing — overlay on an existing drawing. Needs parse-edit-rewrite. Punted until demand.
excalidraw_to_svg — export to SVG for embedding outside Obsidian. Punted.
excalidraw_from_prompt — free-text to diagram. This would re-introduce the expensive raw-JSON path. Punted.
